transcript: Speaker A: A for apple aur B for ball toh tumne bachpan mein hi yaad kar liya tha. Haan, lekin afsos, aaj tak tum English mein dhang se ek poora sentence bhi nahi bol paate ho. Sach toh yeh hai ki aaj ke daur mein bina English ke woh izzat nahi milti jo tum sach mein deserve karte ho. Isse behtar hai ki tum aaj hi MySivi app download karo aur roz sirf 10 minute practice karke dekho. Yahan tumhe milti hai Arya, AI teacher, jo 24 ghante tumhare liye available hai. Tum chahe jitni galtiyan karo, woh tumhe kabhi judge nahi karegi. Sabse khaas baat, sab kuch Hindi mein samjhaya jata hai. Real conversations ki practice karo aur dekho kaise tum fluently English bolna shuru kar doge. Bas roz ka thoda sa waqt nikalo aur phir dekhna, kuch hi dino mein tumhari English dekhkar log surprise ho jayenge. 50 lakhs se zyada log pehle se MySivi use kar rahe hain. Toh intezar mat karo, sirf ₹1 mein shuru karo. Install now par click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [You memorized A for apple and B for ball in childhood. Yes, but unfortunately, to this day you cannot even speak a full sentence properly in English. The truth is that in today's era, without English, you don't get the respect you truly deserve. It's better that you download the MySivi app today and practice for just 10 minutes daily. Here you get Arya, an AI teacher, who is available for you 24 hours. No matter how many mistakes you make, she will never judge you. The most special thing is, everything is explained in Hindi. Practice real conversations and see how you start speaking English fluently. Just take out a little time daily and then see, in just a few days, people will be surprised to see your English. More than 50 lakh people are already using MySivi. So don't wait, start for just ₹1. Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: A FOR, B FOR, Sentence, English, MySivi AI Speak English, 10 min, AI Teacher Arya, Oops!, Practice Fluent English, 50 Lakhs, ₹1, Install Now, MySivi
summary: The ad highlights the social embarrassment of not speaking fluent English despite childhood learning. It promotes the MySivi AI app, featuring a non-judgmental AI teacher named Arya who teaches in Hindi. The CTA invites users to download the app and start practicing for just ₹1.
